title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: AWS CDK is an Infrastructure as Code framework that lets developers define AWS cloud resources using programming languages like Python. The video demonstrates building a serverless REST API using CDK to replace manual AWS console configuration of DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway, enabling single-command deployment and teardown.
